channel.title: Brazil Elections 2026
channel.description: Real-time monitoring of the 2026 Brazilian presidential elections.

item.title: Ipsos-Ipec: 40% avaliam governo Lula como ruim ou péssimo, e 33% como ótimo ou bom
item.description: Ipsos-Ipec survey shows 40% of Brazilians rate Lula's government as bad or terrible, while 33% consider it great or good. Approval of Lula's administration stands at 43%, with 51% disapproval. Trust in the president remains stable, with 56% saying they don't trust Lula.

item.title: Após reveses, Lula fala com Alcolumbre e deve marcar reunião sobre indicação de Messias e liderança no Senado
item.description: President Lula and Davi Alcolumbre scheduled a meeting to discuss government setbacks in the Senate, including Jorge Messias' nomination to the STF. Alcolumbre criticized the government's handling of key agendas and its relationship with leader Jaques Wagner. The meeting will also address recent disagreements between Alcolumbre and the government.

item.title: Crítico de Lula e pivô de polêmica com Moraes: quem é assessor de Trump que quer visitar Bolsonaro
item.description: Darren Beattie, senior advisor to Trump's government on Brazil-related policies, is a hardline critic of the Brazilian government and has been involved in multiple controversies in the US. Bolsonaro requested authorization from Moraes to receive Beattie's visit in prison. Beattie was previously fired for speaking at a white nationalist event and made controversial statements about racism and sexism.

item.title: Governo Lula dá 5 dias para TikTok se explicar por trend com apologia à violência contra mulher
item.description: The Ministry of Justice gave TikTok five days to explain the 'if she says no' trend that encourages violence against women. The government questions the platform's moderation measures and its responsibility in removing misogynistic content.

item.title: Garnier cita voto de Fux para tentar barrar perda de patente no STM
item.description: Former Navy commander Almir Garnier, convicted for involvement in a coup plot, cited Minister Luiz Fux in an appeal to the STM to reverse the Supreme Court's decision that ordered his loss of rank and title.

item.title: Em meio a disputa pelo Senado, PL no Distrito Federal rompe com Ibaneis e pede CPI do Master
item.description: PL in the Federal District broke with Governor Ibaneis Rocha and will launch two Senate candidates: Bia Kicis and Michelle Bolsonaro. The party also filed a request for a CPI to investigate the relationship between Banco Master and BRB, after the district government injected nearly 17 billion reais into the institution under investigation for fraud.

item.title: Presidente da federação do Irã coloca em dúvida participação do país na Copa do Mundo
item.description: The president of Iran's Football Federation cast doubt on the country's participation in the 2026 World Cup in the US, Mexico, and Canada, citing diplomatic tensions and Australia's granting asylum to five Iranian women's national team players. Mehdi Taj harshly criticized the US president and questioned the safety of Iranian teams given recent conflicts between Iran, Israel, and the United States.

item.title: Em meio a escândalos em Brasília, Messias peregrina no Senado
item.description: Justice Minister Jorge Messias is seeking Senate support to be approved as an STF minister amid political scandals involving Banco Master and INSS. Lula may officially forward Messias's name to the Senate after a conversation with Davi Alcolumbre, while the opposition, led by Flávio Bolsonaro, opposes the nomination.

item.title: 2ª Turma do STF tem 2 votos para livrar Gayer em caso de ofensas a Kajuru
item.description: The STF's Second Panel has two votes to dismiss a criminal complaint against deputy Gustavo Gayer for offenses against senator Jorge Kajuru. Ministers Kassio Nunes Marques and Gilmar Mendes disagree on the reasoning - one citing parliamentary immunity, the other focusing on freedom of expression - but agree on the outcome. The votes of Toffoli, Mendonça and Fux remain to define the case.

item.title: Deputado aciona PGR e TCU para investigar vínculos de Moraes com caso Master
item.description: Federal deputy Bibo Nunes requested the PGR and TCU to investigate alleged connections between Minister Alexandre de Moraes and the Master Bank case. Representations were filed to examine possible institutional relationships between financial agents and public authorities.

item.title: Flávio comenta ausência de Lula na posse de Kast: “Transborda intolerância”
item.description: Flávio comenta ausência de Lula na posse de Kast: “Transborda intolerância”

item.title: Deputado bolsonarista quer investigação sobre morte de 'Sicário'
item.description: Bolsonaro-aligned deputy Evair Vieira de Melo seeks investigation into the death of 'Sicário' in a Federal Police cell in Minas Gerais. He filed requests for on-site visit, invitation to PF director-general, and PGR investigation. Mourão was Daniel Vorcaro's right-hand man and was arrested in Compliance Zero operation.

item.title: Deputado bolsonarista quer investigação sobre morte de 'Sicário'
item.description: Deputado bolsonarista quer investigação sobre morte de 'Sicário'

item.title: Impasse com Brandão leva PT maranhense a repensar candidatura própria e cogitar aliança com o PSD
item.description: Impasse com Brandão leva PT maranhense a repensar candidatura própria e cogitar aliança com o PSD

item.title: Presidente da Federação iraniana coloca em dúvida participação do país na Copa
item.description: Presidente da Federação iraniana coloca em dúvida participação do país na Copa

item.title: GSI abre inquérito para investigar morte de agente na entrada do Alvorada, residência presidencial
item.description: An agent from the Institutional Security Cabinet (GSI) committed suicide at the entrance of the Alvorada Palace, the presidential residence in Brasília. The GSI opened a Military Police Inquiry to investigate the circumstances of the death and is providing support to the military's family. Media access to the site was temporarily interrupted after the incident.

item.title: Áudio: Chanceler Mauro Vieira deve falar aos senadores sobre guerra no Oriente Médio
item.description: Foreign Minister Mauro Vieira will be heard by the Senate Foreign Relations Committee on March 18 to explain the government's position on the Middle East war. Senators expressed concerns about Brazilians in the region, humanitarian impacts, and economic effects, including rising oil, freight, and fertilizer prices.

item.title: Bolsonaro pede ao STF para receber visita de assessor dos EUA
item.description: Bolsonaro requested STF authorization to meet with Trump administration advisor Darren Beattie outside regular visiting hours at Papudinha. Minister Alexandre de Moraes also authorized regular visits in April for the former president's political allies.

item.title: Deputado tenta barrar criação do maior parque nacional marinho do Brasil
item.description: Brazil created its largest marine national park in Santa Vitória do Palmar, Rio Grande do Sul, to protect a sensitive ecosystem with endangered species. Deputy Alceu Moreira filed a proposal to reverse the measure, citing negative impacts on fishing and energy projects. Environmentalists defend the creation as strategic to expand protection of Brazilian marine ecosystems.

item.title: Moraes autoriza Bolsonaro a receber visita de Jorginho Mello e Carol de Toni na Papudinha
item.description: Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes authorized former President Jair Bolsonaro to receive visits from Santa Catarina Governor Jorginho Mello and federal deputy Caroline de Toni while in custody. The visits come amid negotiations regarding the party's political alliances in the state.

item.title: Moraes autoriza Bolsonaro a receber visita de Jorginho Mello e Carol de Toni na Papudinha
item.description: STF minister authorizes visits to Bolsonaro in prison by Santa Catarina politicians, including Governor Jorginho Mello and Congresswoman Caroline de Toni. The visits come amid negotiations over PL's electoral tickets in SC, with internal disputes over Senate candidacies between De Toni, Carlos Bolsonaro and Esperidião Amin.

item.title: PGR pede condenação de deputados do PL acusados de desvio de emendas
item.description: The PGR requested the conviction of three PL federal deputies accused of embezzling R$ 1.6 million in congressional amendments. The case involves deputies Josimar Cunha Rodrigues (Josimar Maranhãozinho) and Gildenemir de Lima Sousa (Pastor), who will be tried by the STF's First Panel.

item.title: Bolsonaro pede ao STF para receber visita de assessor de Trump na prisão
item.description: Jair Bolsonaro's defense team requested STF authorization to receive a visit from Darren Beattie, a U.S. State Department official, while in prison. Beattie has previously attacked the STF and Moraes on social media. Bolsonaro is serving a 27-year sentence for crimes against democracy.

item.title: ‘Ninguém está blindado, nem Moraes nem Toffoli’, diz senador ao pedir CPI
item.description: Senator Alessandro Vieira advocates for a Senate CPI to investigate alleged ties between STF ministers and Banco Master, including Alexandre de Moraes and Dias Toffoli. He argues that no one is above investigation and that contract values exceed market standards, requiring transparent scrutiny.

item.title: Lula age para barrar classificação de PCC e CV como terroristas
item.description: The Lula government is organizing a task force to prevent or delay the US classification of Comando Vermelho and PCC as terrorist organizations. The measure prepared by the Trump administration concerns the Planalto due to potential economic and internal political impacts.

item.title: Moraes autoriza Bolsonaro a receber visita de Jorginho Mello e Carol de Toni na Papudinha
item.description: STF minister authorizes visits of Jorginho Mello and Caroline de Toni to Bolsonaro at Papudinha prison. Meetings happen amid negotiations over PL's electoral alliances in Santa Catarina, with internal disputes over Senate candidacies.

item.title: A relatoria de ação do PT no TSE para derrubar vídeo e multar o PL
item.description: The PT filed a case at TSE against PL to remove a video linking Lula's government to the Master Bank scandal, claiming the content is false and aims to influence voters. Minister Estela Aranha was drawn as rapporteur. The PT requests the video's removal and a fine against PL for early negative campaigning.

item.title: 52,4% desaprovam e 43,4% aprovam governo Lula em MG
item.description: Poll in Minas Gerais shows 52.4% of voters disapprove of Lula's government while 43.4% approve. Among 16-24 year-olds, Lula has highest approval (53.3%), but among voters aged 35-44, disapproval reaches 59.1%. Voters with higher education also show higher disapproval (57.9%).

item.title: Governador do Acre deixará cargo pelo Senado e travará ação no STJ
item.description: Acre Governor Gladson Cameli announced he will leave office to run for Senate, following legal deadlines until April 4. He faces charges at STJ for organized crime, corruption and money laundering, but the case may become moot if he leaves before trial.

item.title: PT aciona TSE contra vídeo do PL que liga governo Lula aos escândalos do INSS e do Banco Master
item.description: The PT filed a complaint with the TSE against a PL video linking Lula's government to INSS and Banco Master scandals, calling it 'irresponsible and electioneering'. The video, which used AI to parody 'A Grande Family', was removed for being irregular negative campaign propaganda.

item.title: Comissão de Segurança Pública pede que PGR avalie investigação de trend ‘caso ela diga não’
item.description: The Public Security Commission asked the PGR to investigate the 'if she says no' trend, which simulates violence against women in viral videos. Deputies consider the content encourages violence and should be removed from social media.

item.title: Lula lidera em MG, mas empata com Flávio Bolsonaro no 2º turno
item.description: Poll in Minas Gerais shows Lula leading in the first round with 36.7% of voting intentions, but technically tied with Flávio Bolsonaro (42.7% to 45.1%) in a potential runoff. The survey indicates 43.4% approval for Lula's government, with higher rejection among older voters and those with higher education.

item.title: É #FAKE que Lula disse que Brasil 'está sob ameaça real de invasão' em discurso durante encontro com presidente da África do Sul
item.description: Social media posts falsely attribute to President Lula a statement claiming Brazil is 'under real threat of invasion'. The government denied these claims, explaining that the original speech about national defense and sovereignty was taken out of context during an event with the South African president.

item.title: Bolsonaro pede autorização para receber conselheiro de Trump na prisão
item.description: Jair Bolsonaro's defense team requested authorization from Supreme Court Minister Alexandre de Moraes for Darren Beattie, a Trump administration advisor, to visit the former president in prison. Beattie, who works at the U.S. State Department on Brazil-related policies, has been critical of both the Lula government and Moraes. The visit is requested for March 16-17, outside regular visiting hours, citing the visitor's restricted international agenda.

item.title: Vídeo: Documentário da TV Senado é exibido no 'Big Brother Brasil' e na 'Tela Quente'
item.description: The documentary 'When They Move', produced by TV Senate, was shown on Big Brother Brazil and Globo's 'Tela Quente'. The film portrays stories of three black women and connects their journeys to laws that expanded rights in Brazil over the past 200 years.

item.title: El presidente Lula anula su viaje a la toma de posesión de Kast en Chile por la presencia de Bolsonaro hijo
item.description: President Lula canceled his attendance at Kast's inauguration in Chile, officially citing schedule reasons, but the decision came shortly after news that Flávio Bolsonaro, his likely 2026 election rival, would attend the event.

item.title: Moraes nomeia para cargo de confiança no STF delegado que indiciou Bolsonaro por trama golpista
item.description: Federal Police delegate Fábio Shor, who led the 2022 coup plot investigation and indicted former President Bolsonaro, has been appointed as an advisor in Minister Alexandre de Moraes' office at the STF.

item.title: Projeto proíbe privatização de empresas públicas de tecnologia da informação
item.description: Bill 6352/25, authored by Deputy Natália Bonavides (PT-RN), prohibits the privatization of public information technology companies, considering them essential for digital sovereignty and national security. The proposal also provides for the federalization of state, district, or municipal IT companies in case of sale or liquidation, and requires public consultation for the transfer of sensitive data to the private sector.

item.title: Bolsonaro pede a Moraes autorização para receber assessor do governo Trump na Papudinha
item.description: Bolsonaro requests Moraes' authorization to receive Trump's advisor at Papudinha, claiming the visit is official and the advisor's stay in Brazil is short. Defense requests exceptional authorization for visit on March 16 or 17, with interpreter, considering Bolsonaro's limited English fluency.

item.title: Bolsonaro pede a Moraes aval para receber visita de assessor do governo Trump na prisão
item.description: Jair Bolsonaro requested permission from Minister Alexandre de Moraes to receive a visit from Darren Beattie, a Trump administration advisor, while in prison. Beattie, a critic of Lula's government and Moraes's actions, is scheduled to visit Brazil next week for an event on critical minerals.

item.title: Candidato de direita favorito na Colômbia escolhe ex-ministro para compor chapa
item.description: Candidato de direita favorito na Colômbia escolhe ex-ministro para compor chapa

item.title: Moraes autoriza visitas a Bolsonaro na Papudinha em abril
item.description: Moraes autoriza visitas a Bolsonaro na Papudinha em abril

item.title: Flávio Bolsonaro apoia que PCC e CV sejam considerados terroristas pelos EUA
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro supports US classification of PCC and Comando Vermelho as terrorist groups, a move that worries President Lula's government. The parliamentarian questions why the Brazilian government lobbies against this measure, while the Brazilian chancellor expressed concern to American authorities.

item.title: Argentina concede pela primeira vez refúgio político a foragido do 8/1
item.description: Argentina concede pela primeira vez refúgio político a foragido do 8/1

item.title: Crusoé: Lula contra os “Senhores das Armas”
item.description: Crusoé: Lula contra os “Senhores das Armas”

item.title: Concurso legitima entrada, mas não permanência, diz presidente do STJ
item.description: STJ president states that public exams only legitimize entry into the judiciary, not permanence. During a meeting with court presidents, he emphasized the need for stricter control mechanisms to preserve the judiciary's image, as all judges are affected when one member deviates from their role.

item.title: Guerra no Irã e preço do petróleo atropelam agenda eleitoral de Trump
item.description: The war in Iran is causing significant increases in gas prices in the US, undermining President Trump's economic message ahead of the midterm elections. While Trump downplays the effects, claiming prices are 'artificially elevated' and will fall after the conflict, Republican lawmakers express concern about the political repercussions of rising costs.

item.title: PGR pede que Supremo condene deputados do PL por desvios de emendas parlamentares
item.description: The PGR requested the STF to convict three PL deputies for passive corruption and criminal organization in the diversion of parliamentary amendments. The scheme, which operated between 2019 and 2021, involved extortion of municipalities for the return of part of the resources. The trial is considered a thermometer of the STF's position on the transparency of parliamentary funds.

item.title: Arqueologia na Amazônia ganha força com tecnologia e mais verbas
item.description: Lidar technology is revolutionizing archaeology in the Amazon, enabling the discovery of pre-Columbian sites previously hidden by dense vegetation. The Amazon Revealed project, launched in 2024, is scanning forest areas for ancient human structures. There is also increased interest from archaeologists and available funding for research in the region.

item.title: PGR pede que Supremo condene deputados do PL por desvios de emendas parlamentares
item.description: The PGR requested the STF to convict three PL deputies for passive corruption and criminal organization due to irregularities in parliamentary amendments. The case involves deputies Josimar Maranhãozinho and Pastor Gil from Maranhão, and substitute Bosco Costa from Sergipe. The request was made during a session of the STF's First Panel judging the defendants.
